what_this_subfamily_can_support: Issuer-side acknowledgement timing, remediation visibility, and exact advisory metadata when the vendor published a formal notice
what_it_cannot_support: Independent validation, prevalence, exploit frequency, legal responsibility, or complete ecosystem impact
main_publication_blocker: Still self-authored and should not be collapsed into independent security validation
paper_or_dashboard_use: Reviewer-safe remediation timeline overlay and issuer-vs-CVE comparison rows

what_this_subfamily_can_support: Provenance that a public vendor-side discussion/report exists
what_it_cannot_support: Formal remediation completeness, fixed-version certainty, or evidence-tier upgrade by issue closure alone
main_publication_blocker: Langflow remains repo-issue-grade without formal advisory or release-note-grade remediation text
paper_or_dashboard_use: Methods/limitations row on notice-depth asymmetry and weak vendor disclosure surfaces

what_this_subfamily_can_support: Partial vendor remediation visibility stronger than coordination-only evidence when release notes mention relevant bug-fix themes
what_it_cannot_support: Exact CVE-to-version mapping or complete remediation certainty by itself
main_publication_blocker: CrewAI still lacks a direct CVE-specific vendor bulletin or exact fixed-version statement in the local package
paper_or_dashboard_use: Dashboard facet for partial remediation visibility and manuscript caveat on release-note-grade evidence

what_this_subfamily_can_support: Bounded package-state evidence that a checked public vendor advisory listing did not yield a matching formal advisory row
what_it_cannot_support: Ecosystem-wide non-existence claim or proof that no vendor advisory exists anywhere beyond the bounded check
main_publication_blocker: Negative checks remain useful only when tightly scoped to the checked listing and date
paper_or_dashboard_use: Blocked-source panel for notice-depth asymmetry and evidence-friction captions

what_this_subfamily_can_support: Independent coordination posture, public vulnerability-summary metadata, and some vendor-response visibility
what_it_cannot_support: Direct vendor remediation certainty, exact fixed-version mapping, or complete technical validation beyond the coordination note
main_publication_blocker: Coordination remains useful, but it is not the whole sf11 story anymore and should not be merged with independent-lab validation
paper_or_dashboard_use: Security-source authority matrix distinguishing coordination metadata from issuer and lab layers

what_this_subfamily_can_support: One explicit third-party public-security layer that strengthens bounded mechanism and source-independence claims for a concrete row
what_it_cannot_support: Broad family-balance claims, prevalence claims, vendor-remediation certainty, or a claim that independent validation is now typical across the package
main_publication_blocker: Only one current row carries independent-lab public-security support, so the family remains thin and should stay source-qualified
paper_or_dashboard_use: Reviewer-safe appendix row and dashboard facet showing sf11 is no longer vendor-plus-coordination-only

what_this_subfamily_can_support: A clean limitations statement that peer-reviewed security case support is still absent from the current local package
what_it_cannot_support: Any claim that LIMEN already has peer-reviewed balance across current security rows
main_publication_blocker: Independent-lab presence has moved above zero, but peer-reviewed support remains absent and the family is still one-row deep on independence
paper_or_dashboard_use: Source-family saturation map and methods/limitations appendix row for security-evidence independence gaps
